identity.variant: Standard and Flagship (per official Unitree naming); Japan distributor TechShare uses "Standard" and "Ultimate" for what appears to be the same two-tier split
identity.reason: Confirmed on the current official product page (unitree.com/mobile/G1-D), which gives clean per-variant numeric specs for Standard and Flagship, and on TechShare's 2025-12-01 reservation-sales press release. Unlike DATA-R01's wholesale withholding of specs due to an unresolved variant conflict, the current official page directly states usable per-variant numbers for most fields; only fields that genuinely vary by variant (DoF, runtime, speed) are recorded per-variant rather than forced into one number.

specs.reason: R02がvariant・identityの人間確認を要求している。
R02の正規化値が現行specSchemaの値型に適合しない。分割・型拡張・人間確認が必要。

evidence.normalizedValue: 1260-1680mm column vertical-travel range (Standard footprint 620x620mm; Flagship footprint 525x570mm)
evidence.evidenceSummary: Both variants share the same 1260-1680mm column lift range; footprint differs by variant. This is a lift range, not a fixed standing height like the biped models.
